name: tank_polysemy_v2
description_a: Glass tank or aquarium containing fish, marine creatures, or aquatic life
description_b: Armored military vehicle used in ground combat and warfare

sentences_a.text: The aquarium's largest tank is filled with colorful fish and vibrant coral.
Every morning, she checks the water level in the fish tank to ensure a healthy environment.
A massive tank holds seawater for the marine creatures at the ocean exhibit.
The tropical fish swam gracefully around the ornate decorations inside the glass tank.
To maintain clarity, the tank's filter should be cleaned every two weeks.
Visitors were amazed by the giant turtle that inhabited the central tank of the aquarium.
The reef tank replicates a natural coral habitat, complete with anemones and clownfish.
The aquarium in the corner of the room housed a large saltwater tank with vibrant marine life.
Children gazed in awe as a bright blue parrotfish swam through the coral in the display tank.
Ensuring proper temperature regulation in the fish tank is crucial for maintaining the health of the tropical species.
He carefully arranged rocks and plants to create a natural environment inside the new aquarium tank.
The biologist studied the algae growth on the walls of the experimental marine tank.
Maintaining a saltwater tank requires careful monitoring of salinity and pH levels on a daily basis.
A school of tiny neon tetras darted in and out of the hiding places in their spacious tank.
The pet store displayed a beautifully decorated freshwater tank near the entrance.
She spent the afternoon rearranging the live plants in her community tank at home.
His bedroom tank glowed softly at night, casting blue light across the walls.
The veterinarian recommended adding a heater to the tropical fish tank during winter months.
Bubbles rose steadily from the aerator at the bottom of the cylindrical tank in the lobby.
After months of cycling, the new tank was finally ready to receive its first batch of fish.
The aquarist carefully acclimated the new angelfish before releasing them into the main tank.
Bright LED strips illuminated the planted tank, making the green foliage shimmer underwater.
A pair of clownfish claimed the small anemone in the corner of the saltwater tank.
The museum's centerpiece was a floor-to-ceiling tank filled with jellyfish drifting in gentle currents.
She tested the ammonia levels in the tank every morning before feeding the guppies.
The office reception area featured a sleek, modern tank stocked with colorful freshwater species.
Live rock formations inside the reef tank provided shelter for countless small invertebrates.
He watched the betta flare its fins at its own reflection on the side of the tank.
The children pressed their faces against the glass of the tank to watch the seahorses swim.
A thick layer of substrate covered the bottom of the planted tank, anchoring the root systems.
The tank in the dentist's waiting room always helped calm nervous patients before appointments.
Several species of cichlids competed for territory among the rocks in the large tank.
She carefully siphoned debris from the gravel at the bottom of her tank during weekly maintenance.
The aquarium club held monthly meetings where members shared photos of their home tank setups.
Tiny shrimp scurried across the driftwood inside the nano tank on his desk.
The curved glass of the tank distorted the shapes of the fish swimming near the edges.
A protein skimmer hummed quietly beside the reef tank, removing organic waste from the water.
The teacher set up a small classroom tank so students could observe the lifecycle of guppies.
Moonlight LEDs gave the tank an ethereal glow that mimicked a nighttime ocean environment.
The hobbyist spent years perfecting the aquascape in his competition-grade planted tank.
Colorful discus fish glided slowly through the warm water of the meticulously maintained tank.
The restaurant's lobster tank sat near the entrance, drawing curious glances from diners.
She added a background poster depicting a coral reef to the back of her tank.
The breeding pair of angelfish guarded their eggs on a flat leaf inside the community tank.
An automatic feeder dispensed precisely measured portions of flake food into the tank twice daily.
The quarantine tank in the back room housed newly arrived fish that needed health observation.
Delicate bubble coral expanded its tentacles under the bright halide lights above the reef tank.
He installed a canister filter beneath the stand to keep the tank water crystal clear.
The hospital's pediatric ward featured a colorful tank that entertained children during long stays.
Sand-sifting gobies kept the substrate clean as they methodically worked through the bottom of the tank.
The local fish store had an impressive wall of interconnected display tank sections.
She photographed the rare mandarin dragonet as it perched on the live rock in her tank.
A UV sterilizer helped control algae blooms that occasionally clouded the water in the tank.
The apartment lease specifically prohibited large pets but allowed a fish tank under thirty gallons.
Driftwood leached tannins into the water, giving the blackwater tank a natural amber tint.
He measured the specific gravity of the saltwater in the tank using a refractometer.
The rescue center maintained several large tank enclosures for rehabilitating injured sea turtles.
Fry from the breeding pair hid among the dense java moss growing in the nursery tank.
The glass panels of the custom tank were bonded with food-grade silicone for maximum safety.
An overflow box channeled water from the display tank down to the filtration sump below.
She introduced a cleanup crew of snails and hermit crabs to manage algae in the reef tank.
The hotel lobby featured a massive cylindrical tank that guests could walk around entirely.
Corydoras catfish sifted through the sand at the bottom of the peaceful community tank.
He adjusted the flow rate of the powerhead to create gentle circulation throughout the tank.
The acrylic panels of the tank were lighter and more impact-resistant than traditional glass.
A timer controlled the lighting schedule, simulating natural day and night cycles for the tank.
The public aquarium's touch tank allowed visitors to gently handle starfish and sea urchins.
Nitrogen-fixing bacteria colonized the biological filter media inside the tank's filtration system.
She was proud that her planted tank had won second place at the regional aquascaping contest.
The neon tetras formed a shimmering school that moved in unison through the center of the tank.
He drilled a hole in the back panel to install a bulkhead fitting for the tank's plumbing.
The marine biologist used a specialized tank to study the feeding behavior of cuttlefish.
Cherry shrimp grazed on biofilm growing across the stones and glass of the nano tank.
The retirement home installed a large tank in the common area to provide a calming focal point.
She mixed reef salt with reverse osmosis water before adding it to the saltwater tank.
The university's research lab maintained dozens of small tank systems for studying zebrafish genetics.
Floating plants on the surface of the tank provided shade for the shy species hiding below.
He used a magnetic glass cleaner to remove algae from the inside walls of the tank without getting wet.
The custom-built tank featured a peninsula design that extended into the center of the living room.
Copepods reproduced rapidly in the refugium connected to the main display tank.
She noticed a small crack in the silicone seal and decided to reseal the tank before it leaked.
The daycare center kept a small goldfish tank that the toddlers loved watching during free time.
A chiller unit maintained the cool temperatures required by the cold-water species in the tank.
He carefully netted the aggressive fish and moved it to a separate tank to restore peace.
The floor beneath the heavy tank was reinforced with plywood to distribute the weight evenly.
Macro algae grew in the refugium section, absorbing excess nutrients from the main tank water.
She attended a workshop on advanced reef tank husbandry at the annual marine aquarium conference.
The tank's canopy housed the lighting fixtures and prevented fish from jumping out.
A drip acclimation method slowly adjusted the new arrivals to the chemistry of the destination tank.
He recorded water parameters in a logbook each week to track the stability of his tank.
The senior center organized a field trip to the public aquarium to see the shark tank exhibit.
Caulerpa algae spread quickly across the substrate, turning the refugium tank into a green carpet.
She positioned the return nozzle to create a gentle circular flow pattern throughout the tank.
The veterinary clinic used a small observation tank to monitor recovering aquatic patients.
Sponge filters provided gentle filtration suitable for the delicate fry growing in the breeding tank.
He admired the way the morning sunlight caught the surface of the tank and sparkled across the ceiling.
The library installed a small freshwater tank in the children's section as an educational display.
Bristlenose plecos kept the glass spotless by constantly grazing on algae inside the community tank.
She cycled the new tank for six weeks before introducing any livestock to ensure biological stability.
The designer incorporated a built-in tank into the kitchen island as a unique architectural feature.
Pods of brine shrimp hatched in the hatchery and were fed to the corals in the reef tank.
He upgraded from a ten-gallon to a seventy-five-gallon tank to give his fish more swimming space.
The school's science fair project involved comparing plant growth rates inside and outside a tank.
Water changes of twenty percent were performed weekly to maintain optimal conditions in the tank.
She arranged the rockwork to create caves and overhangs that the wrasses loved exploring in the tank.
The aquarium society donated a large display tank to the children's hospital for patient morale.
A dosing pump automatically added calcium and alkalinity supplements to the reef tank overnight.
He struggled to catch the fast-moving danios darting between the plants in the heavily planted tank.
The tank's background was painted black to make the colors of the fish pop against the dark backdrop.
Emerald crabs picked at the bubble algae growing on the rocks inside the established reef tank.
She learned that overstocking a tank leads to poor water quality and increased aggression among fish.
The moving company carefully drained and transported the tank to the family's new home across town.
Cardinal tetras shimmered with iridescent blue and red stripes under the lights of the planted tank.
He set up a small quarantine tank in the garage to isolate any fish showing signs of disease.
The conference room aquarium was a stunning rimless tank that served as a natural room divider.
Wavemakers simulated ocean currents inside the reef tank, keeping the corals healthy and extended.
She purchased a secondhand tank from an online forum and spent the weekend cleaning and resealing it.
The documentary featured an enormous public aquarium tank that housed whale sharks and manta rays.
He tested the phosphate levels in the tank after noticing an unusual green tint to the water.
A heater guard prevented the curious catfish from burning themselves on the element inside the tank.
The coral fragments she propagated in the frag tank were growing steadily under the blue spectrum lights.
Kuhli loaches burrowed into the sandy substrate at the bottom of the peaceful community tank.
She adjusted the salinity gradually over several days when converting the tank from fresh to brackish.
The tank sitting on the oak stand had been running continuously for over seven years without major issues.
He donated his extra equipment to a newcomer just starting their first planted tank project.
The zoo's reptile house contained a large semi-aquatic tank for the red-eared slider turtles.
Ramshorn snails multiplied quickly in the nutrient-rich environment of the heavily fed tank.
She subscribed to an online forum dedicated to discussing advanced reef tank chemistry and equipment.
The bookstore cafe featured a long, narrow tank filled with fancy goldfish along the window wall.
He carefully calibrated the CO2 injection system to promote lush plant growth inside the tank.
The summer camp counselors taught the kids how to set up and maintain a basic freshwater tank.
Peppermint shrimp helped control the aiptasia problem that had been spreading through the reef tank.
She was delighted when the pair of rams finally spawned on the flat stone in the breeding tank.
The waiting room tank at the orthodontist's office featured a sunken pirate ship decoration.
He replaced the old fluorescent tube with a modern LED fixture that brought out the colors in the tank.
The nature center's touch tank gave schoolchildren hands-on experience with tide pool creatures.
Dwarf gouramis claimed separate territories on opposite ends of the well-planted community tank.
She installed an auto top-off system to compensate for evaporation and maintain the water level in the tank.
The fish room in his basement contained a dozen different tank systems ranging from five to two hundred gallons.
Limpets crawled slowly across the glass, leaving clean trails on the walls of the reef tank.
He introduced a school of harlequin rasboras that added lively movement to the midwater region of the tank.
The elegant rimless tank on the sideboard complemented the minimalist decor of the apartment.
A refugium light ran on a reverse cycle from the display tank, stabilizing the pH overnight.
She found that adding Indian almond leaves to the tank lowered the pH and gave it a natural biotope feel.
The wedding venue had a stunning wall-mounted tank that served as a living backdrop for photographs.
Otocinclus catfish grazed diligently on the diatom film coating the glass of the newly established tank.
He used airline tubing to slowly drip water from the established tank into the bag holding new fish.
The science museum's interactive exhibit let visitors design their own virtual tank ecosystem.
Trumpet snails burrowed through the substrate, aerating the soil bed of the planted tank.
She monitored the calcium reactor output to ensure the levels remained stable in the demanding reef tank.
The break room at the office featured a modest ten-gallon tank that colleagues took turns maintaining.
He researched compatibility charts before adding new species to the existing community tank.
The panoramic tank stretched across the entire back wall of the seafood restaurant's dining room.
Chaeto algae tumbled gently in the flow of the refugium attached to the main display tank.
She placed a mesh divider in the tank to separate the aggressive betta from the peaceful tetras.
The convention center hosted an annual show where enthusiasts competed for best-in-show tank design.
Ghost shrimp scavenged leftover food from the gravel, helping keep the community tank clean.
He chose an oversized canister filter to handle the heavy bioload of the densely stocked tank.
The preschool teacher covered the tank with a towel at night to give the fish a proper dark period.
Zoanthid polyps spread across the rockwork, adding splashes of orange and green to the reef tank.
She planned the layout on paper before placing any hardscape materials into the empty tank.
The hotel spa installed a meditative tank filled with slow-moving koi and floating lotus flowers.
He sanded the edges of the cut glass panels before assembling them into a custom tank frame.
The nursing home residents gathered each evening to watch the fish in the communal tank during supper.
A hang-on-back filter provided mechanical and biological filtration for the modestly sized tank.
She tested the KH and GH levels to ensure the water in the tank was suitable for the discus.
The airport terminal featured a massive cylindrical tank that travelers photographed while waiting for flights.
Amano shrimp methodically consumed the hair algae that had started spreading across the planted tank.
He built a wooden stand from scratch to support the weight of the two-hundred-gallon tank.
The clinic's therapy room included a gently bubbling tank that patients found deeply relaxing.
Ricordea mushroom corals dotted the lower rocks of the tank in shades of blue, green, and orange.
She was careful not to overfeed, knowing excess food would spike the ammonia levels in the tank.
The community center held a raffle, and the grand prize was a fully equipped fifty-gallon tank setup.
He plumbed the return line through the wall so the equipment stayed hidden behind the tank.
The bar featured a long, illuminated tank embedded in the countertop that patrons admired over drinks.
Pygmy corydoras darted playfully through the dense carpet of dwarf hairgrass covering the tank floor.
She chose a low-iron glass tank for its exceptional clarity and minimal green tint at the edges.
The outdoor patio at the resort had a shallow tank where guests could observe colorful marine fish.
A pair of mandarin gobies picked at copepods along the rocky surfaces inside the mature reef tank.
He worried about evaporation during the summer heat and checked the tank water level twice daily.
The brightly colored gravel at the bottom of the tank gave the whole setup a cheerful appearance.
She placed the new driftwood piece in the center of the tank to serve as a natural focal point.
The biology professor used a demonstration tank to explain predator-prey dynamics to the undergraduates.
An elegant stand crafted from dark walnut supported the rimless tank in the foyer.
He noticed the water in the tank had turned slightly cloudy after the last round of feeding.
The coral propagation facility housed row after row of shallow tank systems under intense lighting.
She decorated the freshwater tank with smooth river stones and a small piece of Malaysian driftwood.
A gentle stream of bubbles rose from the air stone anchored in the corner of the tank.
The art gallery surprised visitors with a sculptural tank built into the wall between two paintings.
He counted the fish each morning to make sure none had jumped out of the open-top tank overnight.
The marine research station kept injured pufferfish in a recovery tank until they were healthy enough for release.
She won first place at the aquascaping competition with her intricately designed nature-style tank.
The pediatrician's office had a cheerful tank with cartoon-themed decorations that made children smile.
He spent the weekend plumbing a new sump system beneath the main display tank in the living room.
The outdoor koi pond was drained for winter and the fish were moved to an indoor holding tank.
Every surface inside the mature reef tank was encrusted with coralline algae in shades of pink and purple.
He spent hours watching the slow, hypnotic movements of the moon jellyfish in the specialty tank.
The local aquarium society organized a tank tour where members could visit each other's home setups.
She worried the power outage would drop the temperature in the tank and stress the sensitive corals.
The newly hatched seahorse fry were transferred to a dedicated rearing tank with gentle water flow.

sentences_b.text: The rumble of the approaching tank sent vibrations through the ground, alerting the soldiers of its presence.
Camouflaged in the dense forest, the tank remained hidden, waiting for the signal to advance.
Under the cover of night, the tank division moved stealthily to surprise the enemy forces.
With precision and coordination, the tank brigade launched a swift offensive across the desert terrain.
The engineer worked tirelessly to repair the damaged tank, ensuring it would be battle-ready by sunrise.
As the battle raged on, the tank provided critical support to the infantry units pushing forward.
From the command post, the officer directed the tank units to fortify the western perimeter.
The new tank model featured advanced armor and weaponry, making it a formidable force on the battlefield.
Despite the treacherous conditions, the tank convoy made its way through the snow-covered valley.
In the strategy room, the generals planned the deployment of tank brigades for the upcoming operation.
The commander ordered the tank unit to secure the bridge before nightfall.
As dawn broke, the tank engines roared to life, ready for the day's mission.
The crew spent hours maintaining the tank, ensuring it was battle-ready at all times.
A sudden explosion rocked the battlefield, but the tank pressed forward undeterred.
Strategically positioned on the hillside, the tank provided cover for advancing troops.
The tank regiment moved swiftly through the desert, leaving a trail of dust behind.
With its armor glinting in the sun, the tank led the charge into enemy territory.
Night vision goggles allowed the tank crew to navigate through the dense fog efficiently.
Amidst the chaos, the tank maintained communication with headquarters to receive new orders.
The tank division's arrival turned the tide of battle, giving hope to exhausted soldiers.
Artillery shells bounced harmlessly off the reinforced plating of the advancing tank.
The platoon took shelter behind the tank as enemy fire erupted from the treeline.
Diesel exhaust billowed from the rear of the tank as it climbed the steep muddy embankment.
The gunner rotated the turret and locked onto the target from inside the moving tank.
Radio chatter confirmed that the lead tank had crossed the river at the designated ford.
Mechanics at the field depot worked through the night replacing the tank's damaged track links.
The tank commander surveyed the terrain through his periscope before ordering the advance.
A column of tank vehicles rumbled down the main highway toward the besieged city.
The infantry sergeant requested tank support to neutralize the fortified position ahead.
Smoke grenades launched from the tank created a dense screen that concealed the troop movements.
The tank's main gun fired a round that struck the concrete barrier with devastating force.
Muddy terrain slowed the tank to a crawl as the driver fought to maintain traction.
The cadets studied the tactical deployment of tank formations during their military history course.
An anti-tank mine detonated beneath the lead vehicle, halting the entire armored column.
The driver maneuvered the tank through the narrow streets of the evacuated town with great care.
Satellite imagery revealed the enemy had positioned a tank battery along the northern ridge.
The logistics officer coordinated fuel deliveries to keep every tank in the battalion operational.
Reactive armor tiles on the tank detonated outward, defeating the incoming shaped charge warhead.
The tank's engine produced over fifteen hundred horsepower, propelling sixty tons of steel across rough ground.
Veterans recalled the terrifying sound of a tank crashing through the walls of abandoned buildings.
The squadron leader positioned each tank at intervals along the defensive line before nightfall.
Thermal imaging allowed the tank crew to detect concealed threats in complete darkness.
Captured footage showed the tank rolling through the checkpoint without slowing down.
The defense contractor unveiled a next-generation tank prototype at the international arms exhibition.
Supply trucks followed closely behind the tank column, carrying ammunition and spare parts.
The opposing force abandoned their position when they spotted the tank cresting the hill.
Sandbag fortifications offered little resistance against the sheer weight of the advancing tank.
Recruits practiced loading and unloading the main cannon of the training tank under timed conditions.
The peacekeeping force deployed several tank units along the ceasefire line as a deterrent.
A direct hit from the tank's cannon collapsed the wall of the enemy stronghold instantly.
The tank lurched forward as the driver shifted into gear and accelerated across the open field.
Military analysts debated whether the tank remains relevant in an era of drone warfare.
The crew compartment inside the tank was cramped but heavily armored against fragmentation.
Engineers laid a temporary bridge strong enough to support the tank crossing the narrow ravine.
The general inspected the newly arrived tank shipment at the forward operating base.
Dust clouds kicked up by the tank obscured visibility for the vehicles following behind.
The turret of the tank rotated smoothly on its bearings, tracking the moving target across the horizon.
Soldiers painted identification markings on the hull of each tank before the joint exercise.
The retreating forces destroyed the bridge to prevent the enemy tank from pursuing them.
A reconnaissance drone relayed coordinates that guided the tank to an optimal firing position.
The armored division's tank crews trained extensively in urban warfare scenarios and close-quarters maneuvering.
Heavy rain turned the dirt road into a muddy quagmire that tested the tank's mobility limits.
The tank rolled through the village square, its tracks grinding deep ruts into the cobblestone.
Communications specialists installed encrypted radios inside the upgraded tank to prevent signal interception.
The military parade featured a row of freshly painted tank vehicles proceeding down the boulevard.
An improvised explosive device detonated near the tank but caused only superficial damage to the hull.
The crew conducted a live-fire exercise, engaging pop-up targets from the moving tank at full speed.
Field hospitals were established behind the tank lines to treat casualties from the front.
The tank's stabilization system allowed accurate firing even while traversing rough and uneven terrain.
Intelligence reports indicated the enemy had reinforced their position with several additional tank units.
The veteran described the heat inside the tank during summer deployments as nearly unbearable.
Mine-clearing attachments were fitted to the front of the tank before it entered the contested area.
Ammunition handlers loaded high-explosive rounds into the tank's autoloader magazine before the assault.
The tank battalion formed a wedge formation as it advanced across the wide valley floor.
Repair crews welded patches over the shell damage sustained by the tank during the previous engagement.
The defense minister authorized the purchase of new tank platforms to modernize the aging fleet.
Infrared beacons mounted on the tank helped friendly aircraft distinguish allies from enemies at night.
The historical museum displayed a restored Second World War tank in the outdoor courtyard.
Crew members rotated shifts inside the tank to maintain alertness during the prolonged standoff.
The opposing commander ordered a tactical retreat after losing three tank vehicles in rapid succession.
Spare track pads were strapped to the exterior of the tank for quick field repairs.
The tank's composite armor combined layers of ceramic, steel, and polymer for maximum protection.
Observers noted that the tank left deep impressions in the soft earth as it maneuvered into position.
The rapid deployment force airlifted light tank vehicles to the crisis zone within forty-eight hours.
Blast-resistant seats inside the tank protected the crew from the shock of nearby detonations.
The military academy's curriculum included a module on the evolution of tank design and doctrine.
Fuel consumption spiked as the tank navigated the steep mountain passes at high altitude.
The company commander radioed for the tank to provide suppressive fire on the enemy bunker.
Mechanics discovered a cracked torsion bar during the routine inspection of the tank's suspension.
The tank's low profile made it difficult for the enemy to target from a distance.
Soldiers cheered as the tank broke through the last barricade separating them from the objective.
Electronic countermeasures fitted to the tank jammed enemy guidance systems during the approach.
The crew practiced emergency escape drills in case the tank was disabled during combat.
Armored recovery vehicles towed the disabled tank back to the maintenance depot behind the front lines.
The documentary detailed how a single tank held a critical crossroads for sixteen hours under siege.
Spotters on the ridgeline radioed corrections to the tank gunner, who adjusted his aim accordingly.
The nation invested heavily in upgrading its tank fleet with modern fire control systems.
Auxiliary power units kept the electronics running inside the tank without idling the main engine.
The driver steered the tank onto the flatbed railcar for transport to the next staging area.
Tracer rounds from the coaxial machine gun streaked across the night sky as the tank engaged targets.
Joint exercises with allied forces gave the tank crews experience operating alongside foreign units.
The camouflage netting draped over the tank blended it seamlessly into the surrounding woodland.
Acoustic sensors detected the vibrations of an approaching tank long before it came into view.
The heavily loaded tank sank slightly into the soft sand as it crossed the dried riverbed.
Combat engineers cleared a path through the rubble so the tank could advance into the city center.
The loader slammed a fresh round into the breech as the tank prepared to fire again.
Unmanned ground vehicles scouted the route ahead, relaying data back to the following tank column.
The humanitarian convoy was escorted by a pair of tank vehicles through the dangerous corridor.
The tank's thermal sleeve around the gun barrel reduced warping caused by uneven heating from sunlight.
Veteran instructors at the armor school taught new crews the fundamentals of tank gunnery and tactics.
The ceasefire agreement required both sides to withdraw their tank forces behind the demarcation line.
Airborne troops coordinated with the tank column to execute a combined arms assault on the airfield.
The tank idled at the intersection, its engine rumbling as the crew waited for orders.
Depleted uranium penetrators stored in the tank's magazine could defeat most known armor configurations.
The mud-caked tank returned to base after spending three weeks on continuous patrol in the lowlands.
Strategic reserves included an entire tank brigade held in readiness for rapid deployment.
The trophy system mounted on the tank intercepted the incoming rocket-propelled grenade mid-flight.
Maintenance logs recorded every component replaced and every fault diagnosed on the aging tank.
The tank company commander briefed his crews on the objectives using a sand table model.
Fresh tracks in the snow revealed that an enemy tank had passed through the area recently.
The heavily armored tank withstood multiple direct hits during the fierce engagement at the crossroads.
Fuel tankers refilled the tank platoon's vehicles during the brief halt at the resupply point.
The parade ground echoed with the clatter of tank treads as the regiment practiced formation driving.
A dozer blade mounted on the front of the tank allowed it to clear obstacles from its path.
War correspondents photographed the tank as it rumbled past the bombed-out remains of the bridge.
The national guard activated its tank units in response to the escalating border tensions.
Modular armor packages allowed the tank to be configured for different threat environments quickly.
The tank traversed the frozen lake cautiously, the ice groaning under its enormous weight.
Signal flares launched from the tank illuminated the battlefield in a harsh orange glow.
Engineers designed the new tank hull with a V-shaped undercarriage to deflect mine blasts away from the crew.
The battalion's tank inventory was inspected quarterly to ensure combat readiness and serviceability.
Heavy machine gun rounds pinged off the sloped frontal armor of the advancing tank without penetrating.
The military attache observed the tank demonstration from a viewing platform overlooking the testing range.
Exhaust filters reduced the tank's thermal signature, making it harder to detect with infrared sensors.
The tank platoon leader used terrain features to mask the approach toward the enemy observation post.
Welded steel skirts along the sides of the tank protected the suspension from shrapnel damage.
The decommissioned tank was placed on a concrete pedestal at the entrance to the veterans' memorial.
Night patrols in the tank relied heavily on passive image intensification and thermal optics.
The driver executed a sharp pivot turn, spinning the tank on one track to face the new threat.
Resupply helicopters dropped pallets of ammunition at the prearranged coordinates for the tank unit.
The tank rolled off the landing craft and onto the beach during the amphibious training exercise.
Communications blackout procedures required the tank crew to operate on predetermined movement plans.
Simulated engagements using laser designators helped the tank crews refine their accuracy without live rounds.
The weight of the tank caused the wooden bridge to creak ominously as it crossed.
Military historians credit the tank with fundamentally changing the nature of land warfare forever.
A hydraulic jack lifted one side of the tank so the mechanics could replace the damaged road wheel.
The convoy halted when the lead tank reported a suspicious object on the road ahead.
Cross-country mobility tests pushed the tank through swamps, forests, and rocky slopes over several days.
The base commander allocated additional maintenance hours to prepare each tank for the upcoming deployment.
Soldiers loaded personal gear and rations into the storage bins welded onto the exterior of the tank.
The fire control computer in the tank calculated ballistic solutions for targets at varying distances.
Journalists embedded with the unit described the thunderous sound of the tank firing its main weapon.
The tank's air filtration system protected the crew from chemical and biological contaminants.
Drone footage captured the impressive speed of the tank as it raced across the open steppe.
The armistice required the destruction of surplus tank vehicles under international observation.
Concertina wire entanglements were no obstacle for the tank, which simply rolled over them.
The crew compartment pressurization system in the tank prevented contaminated outside air from entering.
Allied forces integrated their tank formations during the multinational exercise held in the eastern province.
The deafening report of the tank's main gun echoed across the valley after each shot.
A forward observer used a laser rangefinder to provide precise targeting data to the tank gunner.
The peacetime garrison rotated tank crews through a rigorous annual certification program.
Explosive reactive armor tiles shattered outward when struck, neutralizing the shaped charge before it could penetrate the tank.
The field kitchen set up just behind the tank perimeter, serving hot meals to the exhausted crews.
Urban combat doctrine required the tank to operate in close coordination with dismounted infantry squads.
The wrecked tank was towed to a collection point where intelligence teams examined the captured equipment.
Driving simulators allowed new recruits to practice tank handling before getting behind the real controls.
The tank's snorkel kit enabled it to ford rivers up to four meters deep without stalling.
A sandstorm forced the tank column to halt and wait for visibility to improve before continuing.
Sappers cleared a lane through the minefield, marking it with flags so the tank could pass safely.
The memorial wall listed every tank crew member lost in action during the conflict.
The tank commander called for a halt and ordered the crew to conduct a hasty defensive position.
Armored warfare doctrine evolved significantly after lessons learned from each major tank engagement.
The paint scheme on the tank was changed from desert tan to woodland green for the new deployment.
Engineers reinforced the parking area with crushed gravel to support the weight of the parked tank.
The tank's secondary armament included a coaxial machine gun and a roof-mounted heavy weapon station.
Each tank in the formation maintained a hundred-meter interval to reduce vulnerability to area weapons.
The captain patted the hull of his tank before climbing inside, a small ritual before every mission.
Replacement crews arrived at the depot to take over the tank after the outgoing team completed their tour.
The experimental tank featured an unmanned turret controlled remotely by the crew seated in the hull.
Fog of war meant the tank crew often relied on instinct and training rather than clear intelligence.
Protective cages around the tank's turret intercepted incoming projectiles before they struck vital systems.
The formation leader signaled the tank column to increase speed as they entered friendly territory.
A training accident at the range prompted a safety review of all tank gunnery procedures.
The tank's navigational GPS system guided the crew through featureless terrain with pinpoint accuracy.
Battlefield recovery teams worked under fire to extract the crew from the disabled tank.
The old tank sat rusting in the field, a silent monument to battles fought decades earlier.
Border surveillance units reported increased tank movement along the disputed frontier at dawn.
The armorer inspected every round before loading it into the tank's ammunition storage rack.
Satellite tracking allowed headquarters to monitor each tank's position in real time across the theater.
The retired colonel wrote a memoir describing his years commanding a tank platoon in the mountains.
Smoke pots attached to the rear of the tank billowed thick white clouds to obscure its retreat.
The opposing army concealed their tank behind a row of destroyed buildings along the main avenue.
Mortar fragments peppered the exterior of the tank but failed to penetrate the thick armor plating.
The logistics chain struggled to deliver enough diesel to keep every tank fueled during the rapid advance.
An overhead drone strike narrowly missed the tank as it reversed behind the concrete overpass.
The crew painted a small insignia on the turret of their tank after surviving the ambush.
During the ceasefire, both sides agreed to pull their tank assets back fifteen kilometers from the line.
The military police escorted the tank transporter through the civilian checkpoint without delay.
Shrapnel from the roadside blast scarred the hull of the tank but left the crew unharmed.
The young lieutenant climbed into the commander's hatch of the tank and surveyed the landscape ahead.
